<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Argument\Search; class SugGetArguments extends CommonArguments { /** * Performs a fuzzy prefix search, including prefixes at Levenshtein distance of 1 from the prefix sent. * * @return $this */ public function fuzzy(): self { $this->arguments[] = 'FUZZY'; return $this; } /** * Limits the results to a maximum of num (default: 5). * * @param int $num * @return $this */ public function max(int $num): self { array_push($this->arguments, 'MAX', $num); return $this; } }
